channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: Normal People Worry Me (with Jacob Wysocki)
item.description:
Jacob Wysocki joins Brennan to discuss his D&D beginnings, PC backstories, and Mel Brooks.

Duration: 1:34:41

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, jacob wysocki
